title: AI Token limit reaching zero prematurely
description: Users on the 'Pro 2026' plan are reporting that their monthly AI generation tokens are resetting to zero 10 days before the billing cycle ends.

title: T20 World Cup 2026 Live Sync Error
description: The real-time match data integration is lagging by 5 minutes. Fans are getting score updates on their dashboard after they've already happened.

title: Biometric login failing on new 2026 devices
description: FaceID and Fingerprint authentication on the latest 2026 smartphone models are returning 'Hardware Not Recognized' errors.

title: Crypto-Payment refund stuck on blockchain
description: A transaction refund initiated for a failed subscription has been pending for 48 hours. Need to verify the smart contract status.

title: AR Preview not rendering properly
description: The Augmented Reality 'Try-On' feature in the mobile app is showing distorted textures on the latest OS update.

title: Privacy Mode hiding essential navigation
description: With the new 2026 'Ultra-Privacy' setting enabled, the main sidebar menu completely disappears for users in the European region.

title: Voice Command 'Submit' not responding
description: Users using voice accessibility features report that the command 'Submit Ticket' is ignored by the browser interface.

title: Enterprise Dashboard Data Leak Warning
description: A security patch from early April seems to have caused a permission bug where Junior Managers can see Senior Executive payroll data.

title: Translation API mistranslating 'Refund'
description: In the Bengali and Hindi localized versions, the 'Refund' button is being translated as 'Delete Account', causing major customer confusion.

title: Cloud Storage Upgrade not applying
description: User purchased the 5TB expansion pack yesterday, but their account still shows a 'Storage Full' warning at 50GB.
